name: Shrimp, Orange Scented with Vermouth and Fennel
recipeIngredient: 1 whole fennel bulb with feathery top
4 whole garlic cloves, peeled and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the feathery fronds from the fennel bulb, reserving a large handful.
2. Cut the fennel bulb in half lengthwise and remove the core.
3. Slice the fennel bulb thinly.
4. Finely chop the reserved tops of the fennel.
5. Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
6. Add the sliced fennel to the pan and cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
7. Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
8. Add the shrimp, chopped basil leaves, chopped fennel tops, and orange zest to the pan.
9. Cook the shrimp until they turn pink, which should take about 2-3 minutes.
10. Pour in the vermouth and lemon juice, then cook for another minute over high heat.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve immediately.
